overall.description: A static first-person view of a dimly lit medieval tavern interior with gothic stone architecture and arched windows. Several NPCs move about the common room which features wooden furniture, barrels, and stone floors. The scene is rendered in a video game engine with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern common room with gothic architecture

NPC reaches the left side of the room near the stone pillars

entered.detail: tall stone arches with circular blue glass windows at the top, showing night sky
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
warm glowing lantern mounted on the left wall providing ambient light
circular wooden table with items on it in the foreground
stacked wooden barrels against the right wall
decorative rugs placed on the stone tile floor

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a dimly lit medieval tavern with gothic stone architecture. An NPC in dark robes walks across the back of the room from right to left, while other figures remain seated or standing near the furniture. The space features arched windows with blue glass, stone pillars, and wooden furniture illuminated by warm lantern light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze within a dimly lit medieval tavern defined by its gothic stone architecture. It begins with a stationary view of the common room, where warm lantern light contrasts with the cool blue glow emanating from arched windows. As the camera lingers, a figure in dark robes glides across the background from right to left, adding a sense of quiet movement to the space. The scene remains focused on the interplay of light and shadow across the stone pillars and wooden furniture, while other distant figures stay poised in the periphery.
